import React from 'react'; const AnalysisResults = ({ result }) => { const { analysis, features, transcription, recommendations } = result; const getProbabilityColor = (probability) => { if (probability < 0.3) return 'text-success-600 bg-success-50'; if (probability < 0.7) return 'text-warning-600 bg-warning-50'; return 'text-danger-600 bg-danger-50'; }; const getConfidenceColor = (confidence) => { switch (confidence.toLowerCase()) { case 'high': return 'text-success-600'; case 'medium': return 'text-warning-600'; case 'low': return 'text-danger-600'; default: return 'text-gray-600'; } }; return (
{/* Main Results Card */}

Analysis Results

AI-powered speech pattern analysis completed

{/* Key Metrics */}
{analysis.probability < 0.3 ? 'Low Risk' : analysis.probability < 0.7 ? 'Medium Risk' : 'High Risk'}
{(analysis.probability * 100).toFixed(1)}%
ADHD Probability
{analysis.classification}
Classification
{analysis.confidence}
Confidence Level
{/* Recommendations */} {recommendations && (
0.5 ? 'bg-danger-50 border border-danger-200' : 'bg-success-50 border border-success-200' }`}>
{analysis.probability > 0.5 ? ( ) : ( )}

0.5 ? 'text-danger-800' : 'text-success-800' }`}> {recommendations.warning || recommendations.message}

{recommendations.note && (

{recommendations.note}

)} {recommendations.advice && (

{recommendations.advice}

)}
)}
{/* Detailed Features */}

Detailed Analysis

{/* Acoustic Features */}

Acoustic Features

Pitch (Mean) {features.pitch_mean.toFixed(2)} Hz
Jitter {features.jitter.toFixed(4)}
Shimmer {features.shimmer.toFixed(4)}
{/* Linguistic Features */}

Linguistic Features

Lexical Diversity {(features.lexical_diversity * 100).toFixed(1)}%
Coherence Score {(features.coherence * 100).toFixed(1)}%
Filler Words {features.fillers}
{/* Transcription */} {transcription && analysis.transcription_available && (

Speech Transcription

{transcription}

* Transcription may not be 100% accurate and is provided for reference only

)} {/* Disclaimer */}

Important Disclaimer

This tool is for screening purposes only and should not replace professional medical diagnosis. Results should be interpreted by qualified healthcare professionals. Early intervention can significantly improve outcomes.

); }; export default AnalysisResults;
